channel.title: TonForce Blog
channel.description: Latest TonForce news: smart contract updates, TON blockchain analytics, member success stories, reviews and tutorials.

item.title: TonForce v4 launched on TON Mainnet
item.description: The next-generation contract with enhanced security, having passed an internal technical review, is available right now.

item.title: How the 3×8 matrix works in TonForce
item.description: A simple and clear explanation of the matrix structure mechanics and the 4-level deep referral program.

item.title: Technical contract review: results
item.description: The full security analysis of TonForce v4 is complete. All 9 key checks have been successfully passed.
